summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Perfectly Good surplus food marketplace. Verified admin role enforcement fix and tested both backend APIs and frontend UI functionality. Admin panel access and vendor functionality working correctly.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Menu item deletion has implementation issues
flaky_endpoints.impact: Admin cannot properly delete menu items

access_control_issues.issue: Non-admin access control gap - vendor users may access some admin endpoints

ui_bugs.issue: Menu item picker may not show items or is not clearly visible

integration_issues.issue: 5% convenience fee line item not clearly visible on checkout page

passed_tests: Admin panel accessible at /admin with vendor list
Admin can click 'Manage Menu' to see menu items
Admin can access 'Onboard New Vendor' button and form
Home page shows drops with images
Backend convenience fee calculation (5%) works correctly
Search and filter functionality on drops
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix non-admin access control gap where vendors may access admin endpoints. Improve checkout page to clearly display 5% convenience fee line item. Ensure vendor drop creation menu item picker is properly populated and visible.
